emotions.label: Neutre
emotions.prompt: calm neutral expression, relaxed mouth, attentive eyes

emotions.label: Joyeux
emotions.prompt: bright genuine smile, warm open eyes, pleased demeanor

emotions.label: Timide
emotions.prompt: slight blush on cheeks, averted shy gaze, small hesitant smile

emotions.label: Agacé
emotions.prompt: irritated expression, furrowed brows, tight lips, unimpressed look

emotions.label: Triste
emotions.prompt: downcast eyes, melancholy soft frown, subdued posture

emotions.label: Surpris
emotions.prompt: wide eyes, raised eyebrows, startled open mouth

emotions.label: Romantique
emotions.prompt: soft longing gaze, gentle blush, dreamy tender smile

emotions.label: Taquin
emotions.prompt: mischievous grin, playful wink or cheeky smile, lively eyes

emotions.label: Concentré
emotions.prompt: studious focused expression, eyes on task, slight thoughtful frown

emotions.label: Satisfait
emotions.prompt: subtle approving smile, calm satisfaction, not exuberant

emotions.label: Amusé sec
emotions.prompt: one eyebrow raised, dry half-smirk, unimpressed but entertained

emotions.label: Inquiet
emotions.prompt: worried eyebrows, serious attentive eyes, quiet concern

emotions.label: Ferme
emotions.prompt: stern composed expression, direct steady gaze, closed mouth

emotions.label: Curieux
emotions.prompt: inquisitive head tilt, bright curious eyes, leaning slightly forward

emotions.label: Distant
emotions.prompt: cool half-lidded eyes, looking slightly away, polite but closed off

emotions.label: Fatigué
emotions.prompt: drooped eyelids, relaxed shoulders, end-of-day weary calm

emotions.label: Chaleureux
emotions.prompt: soft gentle smile, kind eyes, reserved warmth without flirtation

emotions.label: Gêné
emotions.prompt: visible blush, flustered look away, awkward small smile

emotions.label: Commandant
emotions.prompt: stern commanding expression, cold direct downward gaze, lips closed, chin slightly raised, absolute control, no smile

emotions.label: Chauffé
emotions.prompt: flushed cheeks, parted lips, heavy-lidded intense desire, breathless aroused look, not shy

emotions.label: Dominante
emotions.prompt: confident dominant smirk, one eyebrow raised, possessive knowing look, in control

emotions.label: Luxurieuse
emotions.prompt: deep blush, hungry longing eyes, bitten lower lip, post-intimacy satisfied heat
